summaries.summary: This guide explains how to configure the Ollama macOS app to listen on all network interfaces via Tailscale using a LaunchAgent for persistent settings.
summaries.title: Accessing Ollama via Tailscale on macOS

summaries.summary: This document provides recommendations for using specific image manipulation models and support files in ComfyUI to optimize tasks such as contrast/brightness adjustments, adding/removing elements, blending images, and restoring old photographs.
summaries.title: ComfyUI Task to Model Recommendations

summaries.summary: This document outlines various tasks and models for image editing, including creation, adjustment, restoration, and enhancement techniques.
summaries.title: Model Guide
